course.fullname: Hackathon Pathway 2 of 4: GCP Cloud Workstations Basics
course.summary: Course 2 of 4 in the First-Time Hackathon Pathway. Covers Google Cloud Console, Cloud Workstations, browser-based terminal basics, and the GCP sign-ins and project context that usually block first-time learners.

sections.title: Repos, README-driven work, and staying inside the workstation
GCP sign-ins, projects, and environment values
